form.formComment: Eye-catching performance leading throughout to score by 1.5 lengths in a Mix 6/7 last start at this track, recording a slick 22.68 over the 400m journey. Top win and looms as a strong winning chance.

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by a neck at Shepparton over 390m (22.61) beating Cornhill Scout in Maiden on April 10. Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (26.22) in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win, finishing a 4 length fifth. Has two placings from three starts from the draw. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Ballarat (22.63) in a T3 RSTW, finishing a 3.5 lengths second. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Warragul to win by 2.5 lengths in 22.89, beating Waltzing Blaster. Last start finished last over 400m at this track beaten 9 lengths (23.37) behind Like Dynamite in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win on April 14. Ignore last start. Has ability and can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings at final run of last campaign, finishing fifth (22.73) at Ballarat before going for a four months spell. Others are better placed.
